laws.title: Public Law 22-156 | Local Law Enforcement Agencies Reform and Nurturing (LLEARN)
laws.status_basis: The source is readable and operative. Claude's conclusion and the mass-migration record agree that the operative title 2 amendments and repeal markings are already incorporated into the live Code.

provisions.text_summary: Thirty repeals and six replacements across title 2, including sections 1901a, 1961, 1966, 1966a, 1969, and 1974.
provisions.exact_change: Keep the existing integrated repeals and replacements in title 2; do not duplicate them.
provisions.evidence: codification/laws/laws/PL-022-156/law.txt contains direct title 2 amendments and repeal markings; audit/primary/review-16.json and codification/mass_migration/latest/reports/laws/PL-022-156.md both identify the law as already incorporated.
provisions.notes: The later-law result for section 1966 was resolved by the source record.

current_implementation.detail: Live XML already contains the integrated title 2 amendments and repeal markings; review-16 cites usc02.xml:26951, 27640, 27801, 27809, 27869, and 27989.

recommended_actions: Leave the live title 2 text in place.
Do not duplicate the already incorporated amendments.
Preserve the existing note history.

laws.title: Public Law 22-160 | To Amend the U.S. Code
laws.status_basis: The source is readable and operative, and Claude's conclusion that the law is already incorporated matches the live title 18 text and the mass-migration record.

provisions.text_summary: Replace 18 U.S.C. § 205(a) with the amended text supplied in the enactment.
provisions.exact_change: Replace the existing subsection (a) text with the new principal-officer rule and exceptions.
provisions.evidence: codification/laws/laws/PL-022-160/law.txt contains the title 18 amendment; audit/primary/review-16.json and codification/mass_migration/latest/reports/laws/PL-022-160.md classify the law as already incorporated; review-16 cites usc18.xml:4052 and 4131.

provisions.text_summary: Insert new subsection (j) after subsection (i) in 18 U.S.C. § 205.
provisions.exact_change: Insert the employee-only prohibition as new subsection (j) after subsection (i).
provisions.evidence: codification/laws/laws/PL-022-160/law.txt supplies the new subsection (j); review-16 cites usc18.xml:4103 and 4131.

current_implementation.detail: Live XML already contains the 18 U.S.C. § 205 changes; no further XML change is required.

recommended_actions: Leave the live 18 U.S.C. § 205 text in place.
Do not duplicate the subsection (a) rewrite or the new subsection (j).
Preserve the existing note history.
